notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, third baseman Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. James Wood out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Tena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Tena grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Brady House out at 2nd. José Tena out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young hit by pitch. José Tena to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Ryan Jeffers scores.
